matches.title: The Impact of Digital Transformation on Firm Performance: Evidence from Technology-Driven Business Management Practices
matches.abstract: This study investigates the impact of digital transformation on firm performance using panel data from 5120 firm-year observations between 2014 and 2024. matches.abstract: This dataset contains primary data from a survey of 454 SME owners and managers in the Jabodetabek region (Jakarta, Bogor, Depok, Tangerang, Bekasi), Indonesia. This study aims to empirically examine the impact of digital transformation on SME performance using the Partial Least Squares Structural Equation Modeling (PLS-SEM) method. matches.title: Digital Transformation Barriers and Performance Enhancement in Indonesian Small and Medium Enterprises: A Structural Equation Modeling Approach
matches.abstract: This dataset contains 650-response Indonesian SME survey on digital transformation barriers, management support, external assistance utilization, digital adoption success, and business performance. improvement_plan.title: Strengthen citation signal
improvement_plan.action:
Add real citations to unsupported factual claims. Use the suggested citations below or find verified sources for each claim. Normalize citation style to APA 7 format without inventing sources.

Real citation suggestions from open research sources:
  • A Novel Approach to Analyze Fashion Digital Archive from Humanities (2021) — via arXiv
  • Building and development of an organizational competence for digital transformation in SMEs (2024) — via arXiv
  • Digital Democracy: Episode IV -- A New Hope, How a Corporation for Public Software Could Transform Digital Engagement for Government and Civil Society (2019) — via arXiv
  • Digital transformation (2025) — via Crossref

Use these or similar verified citations. Only add citations for claims that genuinely reference these works.
improvement_plan.evidence: Citation quality is 19.0; citation coverage is 12.5% across claim-like sentences. 14 real citation suggestion(s) found from open research sources.
